name: Configure LMS Quit Integration
description: Create a new SEB exam configuration named 'Biology Final - Moodle AutoQuit' for an LMS workflow where the browser automatically closes upon exam submission. Log into the SEB Server Administration Interface (http://localhost:8080) with credentials super-admin / admin. The configuration must use the Quit URL 'https://lms.university.edu/mod/quiz/review.php' and be set to close immediately without a quit confirmation prompt.
